channel.title: deep-learning on Chaitanya Patel
channel.description: Recent content in deep-learning on Chaitanya Patel

item.title: Attention Modeling for Image Captioning
item.description: Implemented Visual Attention in CNN-RNN architecture for image captioning described in paper Show, Attend and Tell achieving the state of the art accuracy on MSCOCO dataset.

item.title: Persistent Advantage Learning
item.description: Implemented new reinforcement learning operators like advantage learning and persistent advantage learning proposed in paper Increasing the Action Gap: New Operators for Reinforcement Learning. Comparative study was done for the performances of advantage learning, persistent advantage learning and Bellman operators with DQN architecture trained on 5 Atari games.

item.title: VAE for Image Generation
item.description: Implemented Variational Autoencoder generative model in Keras for image generation and its latent space visualization on MNIST and CIFAR10 datasets.
